items.title: Development of Autonomous Trucks in the Global Mining Sector, 2025 Industry Research - China Leads in Adoption with Major Contributions from China Energy
items.description: The market for autonomous haul trucks in mining is expanding due to increased productivity, safety, and cost benefits.
